title: Meri Shapath
subTitle: Vijay travels to Kolkata is search of what he lost long ago, where he meets a lively college girl. When he gets caught up in the midst of a goon family, several events unfold.

title: Main Awara Hoon
subTitle: Two brothers, Sanjeev, a vagabond, and Rajeev, an educated man, cannot get along and finally sever ties. However, their paths cross again when they both fall in love with Archana.

title: Monster Hunter
subTitle: Captain Artemis and her group of soldiers are pulled into a world where dangerous monsters and humans co-exist. Grappled by danger, they must find a way to escape with help from a mysterious hunter.

title: Dashing Diljala
subTitle: A young man goes through a rollercoaster of emotions when he falls in love with three different women at varying stages of his life that help shape him.

title: Gangotri
subTitle: Neelakantham's daughter, Gangotri, falls in love with Simhadri, their servant's son. They face opposition from Neelakantham and things get complicated when he tries to kill Simhadri.

title: Baadshah Pehlwaan
subTitle: Krishna, an orphan, is nurtured by the owner of a gym whose name is Sarkar. He rises against all odds to become a wrestler but eventually gets into a conflict with his mentor when he falls in love.

title: Mere Badle Ki Aag
subTitle: Annavaram pays a visit to his sister and brother-in-law, who reside in Hyderabad. While he is there, he is conned by thugs. Enraged, he decides to teach them a lesson.

title: CID
subTitle: A criminal terrorizes the city when he commits a spree of attacks on anyone named Rina Raj. With the help of a telephone directory. ACP Pradyuman and his team trace.

title: Varudu Kaavalenu
subTitle: Bhoomi, the owner of an eco-friendly start-up business in Hyderabad, is reluctant to get married. However, this begins to change when she meets Aakash, a successful architect.

title: Har Din Diwali
subTitle: Raghu Ramaiyya, an isolated old man, spends his days longing for his children to visit him, until his grandchild Sai arrives to ease his agony.

title: Middle Class Melodies
subTitle: Raghava, a young man, runs a breakfast center in his village but wishes to open a small hotel in a nearby town. However, he faces challenges in his quest and must overcome them to succeed.

title: Miss India
subTitle: A US-based Indian entrepreneur tackles several challenges whilst establishing her tea business and remains headstrong to achieve her goal.
